data.title: Mountain Valley MD Announces Appointment of Advisors and Stock Option Grants
data.description: In Toronto, Mountain Valley MD Holdings Inc. (MVMD) has appointed several advisors and granted stock options to directors, officers, and consultants/advisors. The company hired new advisors to offer strategic advisory services under standard commercial terms. This move aligns with MVMD's goal to strengthen its advisory team and further its business objectives. Additionally, stock options were awarded to key personnel, aiming to incentivize and retain talent within the company. MVMD, listed on the CSE as MVMD and OTC as MVMDF, continues to expand its network and enhance its strategic capabilities.

data.title: SRx Health Solutions and EMJX Issue Letter to Shareholders from Eric M. Jackson
data.description: The Founder and CEO of EMJ Crypto Technologies (EMJX), Mr. Jackson, has given an update on the operational advancements and schedule regarding the proposed merger between SRx Health Solutions and EMJX. This development signifies a crucial step forward in the integration of the two entities.

data.title: 'The Entire Banking System Will Go To ETH,' Says Raoul Pal As Ethereum Attempts Breakout
data.description: Renowned macro investor, Raoul Pal, predicts a major shift in the banking sector towards Ethereum as ETH reaches the significant milestone of testing the 100 exponential moving average at $2,355 for the first time since October. Pal argues against the previous notion that "ETH is dead," highlighting the importance of Lindy effects to banks - focusing on survival, safety, and proven track records. Pal humorously recalls how sentiments regarding ETH's demise circulated 1.5-2 years ago, asserting his belief in the entire banking system transitioning to ETH. He emphasizes that while it may not result in a single-chain system, the adaptability of banks towards established technologies is crucial in the sector. In parallel, Etherealize co-founder Danny Ryan discusses the impact of decentralization on consumer behavior. For further details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: COTY SHAREHOLDER NOTICE: Coty Inc. (COTY) Sued After Surprise Profit Decline, CEO Exit, and Withdrawn 2026 Guidance -- Hagens Berman
data.description: In San Francisco on April 17, 2026, cosmetics company Coty Inc. (NYSE: COTY) is caught up in a securities class action lawsuit. The lawsuit aims to represent investors who bought or acquired Coty common stock from November 5, 2025, to February 4, 2026. Following Coty's actions on February 5, 2026, this legal action has been initiated.

data.title: Schwab enters crypto market with $11 trillion in assets, offers BTC & ETH trading with high fees; CFTC Chair Selig faces bipartisan scrutiny.
data.description: Schwab is now enabling trading of Bitcoin and Ethereum at a substantial cost. The CFTC Chair, Selig, is facing criticism from various political factions.

data.title: IBRX SHAREHOLDER UPDATE: ImmunityBio (IBRX) Sued After FDA Flags Misleading Cancer Claims, Shares Plunge 21%, $2B Market Cap Lost -- Hagens Berman
data.description: A securities class action lawsuit has been filed against ImmunityBio, Inc. (NASDAQ: IBRX) in San Francisco on April 17, 2026. The lawsuit aims to represent investors who bought or acquired ImmunityBio securities between January 19, 2026, and March 24, 2026. This legal action follows recent news regarding the company.

data.title: Townsend Recommends New England Homeowners to Consider Switching from Heating Oil to Propane
data.description: Propane is increasingly becoming an attractive option for households in Massachusetts, New Hampshire, and Maine due to escalating regulatory expenses, environmental concerns, and the efficiency benefits it offers. Townsend, a comprehensive home energy supplier operating in the region, highlights the long-term advantages of propane for consumers. As of April 17, 2026, the company is emphasizing the potential cost savings and environmental sustainability that propane can provide to households in these states, making it a prudent choice for their energy needs.

data.title: Trulieve Cannabis Corp. to Hold First Quarter 2026 Results Conference Call on May 7, 2026
data.description: On April 17, 2026, a cannabis company known as Trulieve Cannabis Corp. (CSE: TRUL) (OTCQX: TCNNF) based in Tallahassee, Florida announced its plans to conduct a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 8:30 AM Eastern Time. The company is recognized as a top performer in the U.S. cannabis industry. The call will follow the release of important information, and investors and stakeholders are eagerly anticipated to participate in discussing the details.

data.title: Naked Diablo Tequila Commits to Giving Back: Supporting Homelessness, Food Access, and Veterans with Every Bottle Sold
data.description: Naked Diablo Tequila unveiled a social impact program in Las Vegas on April 17, 2026. As per the announcement, a portion of proceeds from each bottle sold will go towards addressing homelessness, aiding food charities for the underserved, and offering support to various causes.

data.title: AIC to Showcase Storage Platforms for Media Production Workflows at NAB Show 2026
data.description: In City of Industry, California, on April 17, 2026, AIC Inc., a prominent company in enterprise storage and server solutions, revealed its involvement in NAB Show 2026 in Las Vegas. AIC will be present at Booth N1158, presenting storage platforms tailored for media needs.

data.title: Kayla Edidin Named Chief Operating Officer of Red Door Brands
data.description: A successful executive with a track record of growth has recently joined a franchise group in Knoxville, Tennessee. Kayla Edidin, who previously served as Vice President of Franchise Development for Mike's Red Tacos, has taken on the role of Chief Operating Officer for Red. This move is aimed at expanding the group's portfolio and overseeing operations. The appointment was made public on April 17, 2026. This strategic decision is expected to leverage Edidin's experience to drive growth and efficiency within the multi-unit, multi-brand franchise group.

data.title: GCAPP Celebrates Completion of Impact 2025 Strategic Plan, Reaching More Than 637,000 Adolescents Across Georgia
data.description: In Atlanta on April 17, 2026, the Georgia Campaign for Adolescent Power & Potential (GCAPP) revealed the accomplishment of Impact 2025, a comprehensive strategic plan that had been in progress for five years. This marks a significant achievement in enhancing the health and overall wellness of adolescents statewide.
